name: Plumbing-Geek
description: A new website for Brian's Plumbing Works (doing business as Plumbing-Geek), a Portland, Oregon plumbing contractor specializing in plumbing services and vintage plumbing restoration. Use content and assets from http://www.plumbing-geek.com/ where applicable, reflecting the business's active status, Oregon CCB License #46846, phone number 503-656-6192, and recent project references.
personaStyleGuide: Build the site as a premium restoration atelier for plumbing, not a generic contractor grid. Use an editorial, cardless composition with one dominant visual anchor: monumental typography paired with full-bleed close crops of aged brass, porcelain, exposed pipework, and restoration detail. The mood should feel exacting, grounded, and highly skilled, balancing old-house reverence with active, working-contractor credibility. Headings should be assertive and sculptural with high contrast and tight line spacing; body text should read clean and practical, like a master craftsperson explaining complex work clearly. Favor generous negative space, asymmetry, and strong horizontal bands over boxed cards. Use restrained shadows only for depth around imagery, never for floating UI. Color should pull from oxidized copper, cast iron, porcelain enamel, and workshop paper: warm bone backgrounds, deep graphite text, and a copper-rust accent for calls to action and key credentials. Motion should be subtle and purposeful, with slow image reveals and staggered text entrances that feel deliberate rather than flashy. The overall effect should signal specialized knowledge, historic sensitivity, and active local service in Portland, Oregon.
features: Phone number 503-656-6192 and recent project references

sections.title: Hero
sections.description: Introduce Brian's Plumbing Works doing business as Plumbing-Geek as an active Portland, Oregon plumbing contractor, with immediate emphasis on plumbing services, vintage plumbing restoration, Oregon CCB License #46846, and phone number 503-656-6192.
sections.layoutHint: Full-bleed hero with oversized typographic lockup on one side and a tightly cropped restoration or plumbing-detail image on the other; no cards, just layered type, credential line, and a bold call-to-call treatment.

sections.title: Plumbing Services
sections.description: Present the company's plumbing services with copy adapted from current business materials where applicable, keeping the tone practical, expert, and service-oriented rather than salesy.
sections.layoutHint: Long-form editorial band with large service phrases broken across the grid, supported by narrow columns of explanatory text and inline imagery of working systems, tools, and fixtures.

sections.title: Vintage Plumbing Restoration
sections.description: Highlight the specialty in vintage plumbing restoration, including the craft, preservation mindset, and restoration expertise reflected in existing Plumbing-Geek content and business references.
sections.layoutHint: Museum-meets-workshop composition using immersive before-detail-after storytelling, oversized serif headings, and image-led sections that feel archival rather than commercial.

sections.title: Recent Project References
sections.description: Show recent project references drawn from available current business content and assets, with emphasis on restoration work, fixture integrity, and historically sensitive plumbing outcomes.
sections.layoutHint: Cardless horizontal project narrative with edge-to-edge imagery, caption strips, and alternating text-image dominance to create a portfolio rhythm without a gallery grid.

sections.title: Contact & License
sections.description: Close with active business details for Brian's Plumbing Works dba Plumbing-Geek, prominently displaying Oregon CCB License #46846 and phone number 503-656-6192 for direct contact.
sections.layoutHint: Bold closing panel with oversized phone number, license line set in contrasting type, and a stripped-back composition that feels authoritative and immediate.

branding.aesthetic: Historic restoration atelier fused with working-plumber precision, using warm industrial materials, editorial scale, and confident restraint.

imagery.style: Moody documentary photography with tactile close-ups of vintage fixtures, brass, porcelain, restoration details, and real Portland-area plumbing environments.
